dict.string: NexGenSpec uses the camera to capture inspection photos and to scan rooms with LiDAR.
Used for importing/exporting inspection images and annotations.
NexGenSpec uses your location to auto-fill the property address when creating a new inspection.
NexGenSpec adds inspection appointments to the calendar you choose and reads your other events to flag scheduling conflicts. Calendar access is optional.
NexGenSpec adds inspection appointments to the calendar you choose so you can see them alongside the rest of your schedule.
